Specifies files and directories to ignore in version control, including build files and waf lock files.

# Purpose
The file specifies patterns for files and directories that the version control system must ignore. It instructs the system to ignore all files and directories named `build` and any files that match the pattern `.lock-waf*`, which are typically generated during the build process.
